metadata.description: Speak Claude Code activity out loud while you're AFK — agent-callable speak_summary / speak_status / speak_blocker tools, OS-native TTS by default.

plugins.name: readless
plugins.description: MCP-based voice plugin: the agent calls speak_summary at turn end, speak_status mid-task, and speak_blocker when stuck. Defaults to free OS voices (macOS say / espeak-ng / Windows SAPI); OpenAI and ElevenLabs supported when a key is set. Run /readless:setup after install.
